title: Take Off the Cross, the Turban, the Hijab, or Find Another Job.
desc: The Charter promises freedom of religion. Quebec's Bill 21, now before the Supreme Court, is testing what that promise is worth.

title: Your Charter Rights Have a Catch. It's Called the Oakes Test.
desc: Why no Charter right is absolute, and how courts decide when the government is allowed to limit yours.

title: The Canadian Charter of Rights and Freedoms: A Plain-Language Overview
